case_title: CARMEN M. HEDLUND VS. CHASE CARD MEMBER SERVICES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-07-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO NOV-08-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,328.73 FILED BY HEDLUND, CARMEN M. AS TO DEFENDANT CHASE CARD MEMBER SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-07-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-08-2021 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CHASE CARD MEMBER SERVICES
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT CHASE CARD MEMBER SERVICES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-08-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-08-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF CARMEN M. HUDLUND IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHASE CARD MEMBER SERVICES IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ANDREA SELBA, PARALEGAL. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HEDLUND, CARMEN M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHASE CARD MEMBER SERVICES $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,550.00, NO EVIDENCE OF AUTHORIZED CHARGES FOR $2500.00 OF TRANSACTIONS AT TARGET AND SEPHORA. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCAN DOCUMENT. FILED BY DEFENDANT CHASE CARD MEMBER SERVICES
